behavior_summary: This script manages a lava-bubble area trigger: when an actor enters the fast-area it marks/updates info on a target and starts a looping ambient bubbling SFX; when the actor leaves it updates info and stops that SFX.

Entry sequence: set an info key (0x021B) on a referenced object, exclude that object from further processing (engine-level 'process exclude'), then call playAmbientSFX with parameters including sound id 0x57 and a modifier 0x32 — inferred to start the bubbling sound at the trigger location.
Exit sequence: set a different info key (0x021C) on the referenced object, apply the same process-exclude behavior, and call stopSFX for id 0x57 to stop the bubbling sound.
notable_control_flow: Event-driven: runs in response to area trigger events (U8P_LAVABUB::enterFastArea and leaveFastArea).
Deterministic, short sequences: each handler performs a small, fixed series of engine calls (set-info, process-exclude, SFX start/stop) with no loops or complex branching.
State-driven: uses info identifiers (0x021B/0x021C) to record or toggle object/area state when entering or leaving the area.
open_questions: What exact game-state fields or semantics do info ids 0x021B and 0x021C represent (e.g., flag names or UI state)?
What does the activator's indirect +02h two-byte field precisely reference (a tile id, object id, or SFX location handle)?
What is the meaning of the 0x32 parameter passed to playAmbientSFX (volume, priority, variation, or distance attenuation)?
Are set-info and process-exclude also altering other systems (AI, rendering, or persistence) beyond preventing further processing?

main_function.name: U8P_LAVABUB::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: Handle an actor entering the lava-bubble trigger: update object/area info, exclude the target from further processing, and start an ambient lava-bubbling sound effect at the target/location.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when an Avatar (or relevant actor) enters this object's fast-area region (U8P_LAVABUB::enterFastArea event).

function_map.name: U8P_LAVABUB::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Area-entry handler that sets area state and starts ambient SFX.

function_map.name: U8P_LAVABUB::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Area-exit handler that sets area state and stops ambient SFX.

function_map.name: U8P_LAVABUB::playAmbientSFX
function_map.role: Engine routine to start/play a localized ambient sound effect (called by U8P_LAVABUB::enterFastArea).

function_map.name: U8P_LAVABUB::stopSFX
function_map.role: Engine routine to stop a sound effect previously started (called by leaveFastArea).

function_map.name: U8P_LAVABUB::set info + process exclude
function_map.role: Engine operations used to set an info key on an object and exclude it from processing; observed in both enter and leave handlers.

external_calls.purpose: Record an info value (0x021B) on a referenced object and mark it to be excluded from further processing; used to update internal state on entry.

Start the lava-bubbling ambient SFX at the referenced location/object. Observed pushed args include the activator/object reference, its indirect +02h 2-byte field, a byte 0x32 (parameter), and a byte 0x57 (SFX id).
Record an info value (0x021C) on the referenced object and mark it to be excluded from further processing; used to update internal state on exit.
Stop the previously started lava-bubbling SFX (id 0x57) for the referenced location/object.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script manages a lava-bubble area trigger: when an actor enters the fast-area it marks/updates info on a target and starts a looping ambient bubbling SFX; when the actor leaves it updates info and stops that SFX.
